system.description:
This mysterious Iruvian hides behind a veil. For years, she has been the final word on Duskvol delicacies. She specializes in evaluating high-end cuisine (including spore wines and cooking with leviathan blood.) She stays in the public eye with racy politics and a string of scandalous romances.

She must keep real competition for her fame weakened and embarrassed, and she has countless enemies. Everyone "knows" she is an Iruvian spy.
